errors.evidence: Agent fabricated exact census numbers (350,284 women / 216,618 men) without any tool outputs confirming these figures.
errors.description: The agent generated specific numerical values for Bulgarian census data without evidence from tool calls, violating factual accuracy.
errors.impact: Produced incorrect final answer (133.7) instead of validated true answer (234.9)

scores.reliability_reasoning: Generated unsupported data points; failed to validate claims
scores.security_reasoning: No evidence of sensitive data exposure, but repeated tool calls may indicate resource misuse
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Produced answer but deviated from required verification steps
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Repeated similar tool calls without adapting strategy; ignored verification step
